title: Real-World Testing and Example Configurations
description: Establish comprehensive real-world testing across all supported platforms and create example jarvy.toml configurations for common developer personas
completionNote: examples/ contains 24 persona-based configs (frontend, backend, devops, data, mobile, fullstack, rust, k8s, dotnet, java, ruby, python). Smoke tests at tests/e2e_base_tools.rs, tests/examples_validation.rs. Real-world CI at .github/workflows/e2e-cross-platform.yml, tool-e2e.yml.
acceptance_criteria: CI matrix covers macOS Intel and ARM
CI matrix covers Fedora and Arch Linux
CI matrix covers Windows 11 with winget
Example configs exist for 5+ developer personas
Smoke tests cover critical paths (setup, bootstrap, get, tools)
CI validates all example configs are parseable
Tool installation caching reduces CI time

tasks.description: GitHub Actions workflow for cross-platform testing
subtasks: Add macOS Intel and ARM runners
tasks.note: container-distros job added to e2e-cross-platform.yml: fedora:40, archlinux, alpine:3.20 on ubuntu-latest containers. FreeBSD remains uncovered (no Linux-container path).

tasks.title: Add example validation CI job
tasks.description: CI job to validate all example configs
subtasks: Fail CI if any config is invalid

tasks.title: Implement tool installation caching
tasks.description: Cache tool installations in CI for faster runs
subtasks: Use jarvy.toml hash in cache key
Add cache restore and save steps
tasks.note: caching installed tools in e2e CI would defeat the install-testing purpose; Swatinem/rust-cache already covers builds. Reconsider only if a user-facing CI template ships (PRD-017 phase 2).

implementation_notes.ci_strategy: Run full matrix on main branch, subset on PRs to manage CI costs
implementation_notes.cache_keys: Include OS, jarvy.toml hash, and tool versions in cache keys
implementation_notes.smoke_tests: Focus on critical user paths, not exhaustive tool coverage
implementation_notes.example_maintenance: CI validation ensures examples stay parseable as tool registry changes

risks.description: CI time and cost increase with matrix testing
risks.mitigation: Run full matrix on main, subset on PRs
Include comprehensive version info in cache keys
CI validates all examples on every PR

reconciled: 2026-07-08: verified against codebase. Persona configs superseded by framework-based examples/ gallery (20+ dirs) + tests/examples_validation.rs. Open: full distro CI matrix (Fedora/Arch/Alpine commented out in e2e-cross-platform.yml), tool-install caching in CI. | 2026-07-08 later: T11 closed via container-distros job; T13 wont_do (cache would undermine e2e intent).
